name: openclaw--skills--agent-chronicle
description: AI-powered diary generation for agents - creates rich, reflective journal entries (400-600 words) with Quote Hall of Fame, Curiosity Backlog, Decision Archaeology, Relationship Evolution, mood analytics, weekly digests, "On This Day" resurfacing, and cron auto-generation. Works best with Claude models (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus). Use when this capability is needed.
